HO-Azure :: attack-path-focused Azure recon
context :: tenant=auto subscription=auto output=table

[managed-identities] Mapping workload-linked managed identities and their visible privilege cues.
ho-azure managed-identities

╭───────────────────────────────┬────────────────┬─────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ identity                      │ type           │ attached to         │ operator signal                                                   │ next review                                                                                                                 │
├───────────────────────────────┼────────────────┼─────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ ua-app                        │ userAssigned   │ vm-web-01           │ Public VM workload pivot; direct control visible.                 │ Check permissions for direct control on this identity, then vms for the host context behind the workload pivot.             │
│ vmss-edge-01-system           │ systemAssigned │ vmss-edge-01        │ Exposed VMSS workload pivot; direct control not confirmed.        │ Check vmss for the fleet context behind this workload pivot, then permissions to confirm direct control.                    │
│ func-orders-system            │ systemAssigned │ func-orders         │ Public Function App workload pivot; direct control not confirmed. │ Check env-vars for secret-bearing config on this workload, then permissions to confirm direct control.                      │
│ ua-orders                     │ userAssigned   │ func-orders         │ Public Function App workload pivot; visibility blocked.           │ Check env-vars for the backing workload context; current scope does not yet show direct control on this identity.           │
│ app-empty-mi-system           │ systemAssigned │ app-empty-mi        │ Public App Service workload pivot; direct control not confirmed.  │ Check env-vars for secret-bearing config on this workload, then permissions to confirm direct control.                      │
│ app-public-api-system         │ systemAssigned │ app-public-api      │ Public App Service workload pivot; direct control not confirmed.  │ Check env-vars for secret-bearing config on this workload, then permissions to confirm direct control.                      │
│ la-inbound-redeploy-identity  │ systemAssigned │ la-inbound-redeploy │ Internal Logic App workload pivot; direct control visible.        │ Check permissions for direct control on this identity, then logic-apps for the workflow context behind this workload pivot. │
│ ua-workflow-router            │ userAssigned   │ la-event-router     │ Internal Logic App workload pivot; direct control visible.        │ Check permissions for direct control on this identity, then logic-apps for the workflow context behind this workload pivot. │
│ ml-ops-hub-workspace-identity │ systemAssigned │ ml-ops-hub          │ Public Azure ML workload pivot; direct control visible.           │ Check azure-ml for the workspace, compute, and execution context behind this workload pivot.                                │
│ ua-ml-ops                     │ userAssigned   │ ml-ops-hub          │ Public Azure ML workload pivot; direct control visible.           │ Check azure-ml for the workspace, compute, and execution context behind this workload pivot.                                │
╰───────────────────────────────┴────────────────┴─────────────────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Findings:
- HIGH: Managed identity has elevated role assignment
  Identity 'ua-app' is assigned one or more high-impact roles (Owner).
- HIGH: Managed identity has elevated role assignment
  Identity 'la-inbound-redeploy-identity' is assigned one or more high-impact roles (Contributor).
- HIGH: Managed identity has elevated role assignment
  Identity 'ua-workflow-router' is assigned one or more high-impact roles (Contributor).
- HIGH: Managed identity has elevated role assignment
  Identity 'ml-ops-hub-workspace-identity' is assigned one or more high-impact roles (Contributor).
- HIGH: Managed identity has elevated role assignment
  Identity 'ua-ml-ops' is assigned one or more high-impact roles (Owner).

Takeaway: 10 managed identities visible; 8 exposed workload pivots and 5 direct-control cues from current scope.
